response.overview: Kazan artist Grigory Ivanchenko is a wizard in a sense. For 30 years, he has been creating sculptures for Kazan, thus providing the city with energy peace. His axiom: life is a category of creativity, thoughts are material and have very real forms. Whimsical curves, plastic shapes, mysterious symbols… The artist himself calls these thoughts-forms materialized in concrete bends, amulets of urban space…»  Special prize of the VIII international 3D stereo film Festival in 2017 (Moscow)
response.title: The Thirteenth Amulet
